title: werauhia capitata
intro: Werauhia capitata, also known as the 'Pupu fern', is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Werauhia capitata include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as being used to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by boiling its leaves in water to create a decoction, which is then consumed or used as a topical application.
